_note: Recommended configs from v6-engine analysis (FINDINGS_TASK5.md). For PLATFORM validation only — not auto-created. All validated on real 1m data 2018-2024, v6 engine matched to platform on nBnU v1.

primary_recommendation.name: 4coin-eqw-stop008-lev1.5
primary_recommendation.rationale: Best on Itamar's priority order (green-months, green-years, return, DD). Beats the ETH-only champion on all three top priorities.

alternative_higher_return.name: BTC+ETH-eqw-stop008-lev2
alternative_higher_return.rationale: Much higher return, but green-months 58% and platform DD ~52% (borderline over 50%).

stop_loose_finding.summary: stop_loose 0.008 > 0.006 on ETH (Pareto: +growth, -DD) and XRP; neutral/slightly worse growth on BTC/BNB; improves green-months on all 4. Adopt 0.008 portfolio-wide for the consistency gain.

rejected.entry_indicator_filter: No per-trade winner/loser predictability (OOS AUC ~0.5 even with 1m micro+volume+BTC). See FINDINGS_TASK4*.
rejected.trend_slope_confirmation: Hurts: drops the rare big winners (gx704->12). Rejects '2-3 candle slope confirmation'.
rejected.dynamic_leverage_by_confidence: No reliable per-trade confidence signal -> not justified. Use static leverage + diversification.
rejected.unequal_portfolio_weights: inverse-vol ~= equal; no benefit. Use equal weights.

kept_minor.near_MA_entry_guard: Skip entries where |price-MA|/MA > ~1% (chasing). Weak-but-real (beats random), mechanical, cheap. Proposed v6 guard.
